createOrgFromZip: Create a new organization from Toggl export zip
zipUploadDescription: In Toggl, go to Settings → Data Export → Data Export to download the zip. Upload the original *.zip file here. The backend creates a new organization and its default workspace, then imports the extracted JSON bundle into that new workspace.
zipHint: The archive should contain a root folder like
enterOrgNameHint: Enter an organization name above to start import.
importTimeEntriesCsv: Import time entries CSV into current workspace
csvUploadDescription: In Toggl, go to Settings → Data Export → Time Entries to download the CSV. Upload it here. The backend imports rows into
csvHint: Expected columns include `User`, `Email`, `Project`, `Description`, `Start date`, `Start time`, `Duration`, and `Tags`.
enterNewOrgName: Enter a new organization name and upload a valid Toggl export zip.
archiveUploadFailed: Archive import upload failed. Retry with the original Toggl export zip.
csvNotValid: The uploaded CSV is not a valid Toggl time entries export.
noPermission: You do not have permission to import time entries into this workspace.
retryWithOriginalCsv: Time entries import failed. Retry with the original Toggl CSV export.
